overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a wet futuristic city street at dusk. The scene transitions from an open intersection with the 'EL GUAPO' building into a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by vibrant pink and purple neon lights, ending with an ascent up concrete stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with commercial buildings

events.description: character begins walking forward along the wet sidewalk
futuristic vehicles drive past on the multi-lane street to the right

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the sidewalk, moving away from the EL GUAPO building corner

notable_agents.action: futuristic red car driving along the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with large illuminated 'EL GUAPO' signage
wet asphalt road reflecting the dusk light with moving traffic
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
multi-story buildings with glass facades and illuminated windows
large digital advertising screens with purple and white graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a city street corner dominated by the EL GUAPO building. The character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk at dusk, with palm trees visible in the distance and futuristic vehicles passing on the multi-lane street. The environment features modern commercial architecture with glowing neon billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and digital displays

events.description: ambient natural light decreases as buildings block the dusk sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and digital advertising displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in distinctive clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: elevated walkway bridge crossing over the street ahead
ground-level shops with bright orange and blue neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character progresses along the commercial sidewalk, passing closer to modern buildings with neon storefronts. The EL GUAPO building and palm trees recede from view as a pedestrian overpass becomes visible in the distance. The lighting transitions from natural dusk to a mix of artificial neon illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon ceiling

events.description: entering covered walkway with dramatic pink neon ceiling lights
ambient lighting shifts to vibrant pink and purple neon illumination from overhead panels

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered section under vibrant pink overhead lighting, approaching stairs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt and shorts walking ahead under the covered walkway

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure with integrated lighting panels
rows of rectangular ceiling panels emitting bright pink and magenta light
large vertical billboard with purple background and white text reading 'FEEL THE INTENSITY'

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by dramatic pink neon ceiling panels. The 'FEEL THE INTENSITY' billboard is visible on the left as the environment becomes fully sheltered. Other pedestrians are visible ahead, and concrete stairs become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway entrance with colorful neon lighting

events.description: character approaches and begins ascending the concrete stairs
moving up stairs into upper level walkway with changing colored lights

agents.ego_description: ascending the concrete stairs under colorful shifting neon ceiling panels

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket and green pants walking up the stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward
ceiling panels cycling through pink, blue, and green neon colors
elevated pedestrian platform visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the covered walkway and begins ascending a concrete staircase. The ceiling features dynamic neon panels shifting between pink, blue, and green colors. Other pedestrians are also climbing the stairs toward the upper level walkway visible above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wet futuristic city street that transitions from an open commercial intersection into a neon-lit pedestrian corridor. It begins at a street corner dominated by the EL GUAPO building, where the character walks along a damp concrete sidewalk past distant palm trees and passing futuristic vehicles. As the character progresses, the open architecture of the intersection recedes and the natural dusk light begins to blend with the glow of artificial neon storefronts. The scene then shifts focus away from the main road as the camera follows the character closer to the modern buildings, finally turning toward a pedestrian overpass appearing in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open city street into a sheltered neon corridor that culminates in an ascent to an upper level. It begins as the character enters a covered pedestrian walkway, where the environment becomes fully sheltered under dramatic pink neon ceiling panels and a billboard reading FEEL THE INTENSITY. As the camera moves forward past other pedestrians, the perspective shifts toward a set of concrete stairs appearing in the distance. The scene then transitions from the flat walkway to an upward climb, with the overhead lighting shifting dynamically between pink, blue, and green hues. Finally, the camera follows the character and other pedestrians up the staircase toward the elevated walkway visible above.
